# ibm-sg-language-and-grammar

IBM Style Guide review for language and grammar: abbreviations/acronyms,
capitalization, active voice, inclusive language (avoid master/slave,
blacklist/whitelist, gendered pronouns), contractions, anthropomorphism, and
preferred terminology (avoid "utilize", "leverage", "via", "in order to",
"please"). Checklist-driven, no CLI arguments; composed by
`docs-review-style`. For Red Hat content, `rh-ssg-grammar-and-language` takes
precedence on conscious language and contractions.

**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
Check this doc for IBM grammar and inclusive-language issues
```
